title: PeanutCraft
description: Adds peanuts which you can craft peanut related stuff from
body:
This mod adds Peanuts to the game of Minecraft.

To get them you will need to harvest grass to get Peanut seeds.
You can then plant the seeds on farmland and get peanuts. With those peanuts you can craft items such as Peanutbutter, Peanut bread, Peanut butter bread, Peanut pie.

There's more to come in the future

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
